stemHtml: When checking fuel for contaminants, the fuel should be checked (1) _____, the colour of the fuel (2) _____, and when water contamination is present (3) _____.

options.a: (1) 30 minutes after refuelling; (2) Jet A-1 is blue; (3) It turns cloudy
options.b: (1) 30 minutes after refuelling; (3) AVGAS 100LL is clear or straw coloured; (3) It turns pink
options.c: (1) Before the first flight of the day; (2) Jet A-1 is clear or straw coloured; (3) It turns cloudy
options.d: (1) Before the first flight of the day; (2) Avgas 100LL is clear or straw coloured; (3) Nothing happens
